deleteAllConfirm: This will permanently delete your companion and all progress. Are you sure?

speciesSelect.title: Who will join you?
speciesSelect.subtitle: Each companion follows a unique path of growth

felis.name: Felis
felis.description: A fierce little spirit that never stops exploring. Grows from a curious kit into a legendary digital warrior.

spectra.name: Spectra
spectra.description: A ghost of starlight that wanders the cosmos. Grows from an ethereal wisp into an infinite digital universe.

dolcis.name: Dolcis
dolcis.description: A sweet soul that discovers its voice through care and warmth. Grows from a gentle treat into a voice of comfort.

lumis.name: Lumis
lumis.description: A blank page ready to be filled with experience. Grows from a humble note into a timeless relic of wisdom.
